steps.title: Use the known point to find the coefficient
steps.content:
The model is $y=900ax^2$, and the graph contains the point $(2.75,9528.75)$. Substitute the point:
$$9528.75=900a(2.75)^2.$$

steps.title: Solve and evaluate
steps.content: Since $\left(900\right)(2.75)^2=6806.25$, $$a=\frac{9528.75}{6806.25}=1.4.$$ Then $900a=1260$, so at $x=7.50$: $$y=1260(7.50)^2=70{,}875.$$ The answer is 70875. The requested response box wants the numerical value only, so enter 70875 without a comma.
